description_long: This house features a simple rectangular structure with a flat, brown roof and white exterior walls. The front facade includes a single, large wooden door and a double-pane window with a wooden frame, both set into the white wall. The base of the house appears to have a dark, possibly stone or tile foundation, adding contrast to the lighter upper walls. The roof is flat and extends slightly beyond the walls, providing a minimal overhang. The window placement is asymmetrical, with the door and window separated by a significant distance. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function.
description: A rectangular, single-story house with a flat brown roof, white walls, a large wooden door, and a single window. The design is simple and functional, with minimal ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the white wall, a large wooden door on the right, and a double-pane window on the left.
description_view_1: Side view showing the solid white wall and the brown flat roof, with minimal visible features.
description_view_2: Rear or top-down view showing the flat brown roof, the window, and the door, as well as the dark foundation base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain white wall and the flat brown roof, with no windows or doors visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Single large wooden door with no steps, porch, or decorative elements; minimal overhang from the flat roof.
